description: Astronomical images often contain signals across multiple spatial scales. Your task is to apply an FFT Bandpass Filter to isolate intermediate spatial frequencies in the Ultraviolet galaxy image at ~/AstroImages/raw/uit_galaxy_sample.fits, enhancing the spiral arms while suppressing both background gradients and pixel noise. Use the following filter settings: filter large structures down to 40 pixels, filter small structures up to 3 pixels, no stripe suppression, 5% tolerance, autoscale enabled, and saturation disabled. Save the resulting filtered image to ~/AstroImages/processed/uit_bandpass_filtered.fits. Create a text report at ~/AstroImages/processed/filter_report.txt containing the filter parameters used and the full-image statistics (Mean, Standard Deviation, Min, and Max) of the filtered image.
